name: integration_sold_my_saas_for_6m_after_talking_to_3
method: Sold my SaaS for $6M. After talking to 30 buyers, here's what actually mattered in the sale. Eight months ago I started the process of selling my B2B SaaS. $1.2M ARR, 85% gross margin, 95% net retenti

phases.name: content_and_product_parallel
steps: run engagement_bait_converter.py on acquisition framework (thread: '3 things buyers actually care about')
generate SaaS Exit Readiness Scorecard PDF (customer_concentration + competitive_moat + founder_dependency scoring rubric)

phases.name: distribution
steps: upload scorecard to PRODUCTS/GUMROAD_INSTANT_UPLOAD/ as product #23 ($29)
scrape r/SaaS exit-intent posts via reddit_deep_scraper.py --keyword 'sell acquisition exit'
queue 5 cold DMs/emails to founders with scorecard as lead magnet
